recommendations.title: The Devil's Violinist
recommendations.overview: The life story of Italian violinist and composer, Niccolò Paganini, who rose to fame as a virtuoso in the early 19th Century.

recommendations.title: Paperhouse
recommendations.overview: A young girl lost in the loneliness and boredom of reality finds solace in an ill boy, whom she can visit in a surreal dream world that she drew in her school composition book.

recommendations.title: Frankenstein

recommendations.title: Mr. Nice

recommendations.title: The Grapes of Death
recommendations.overview: A young woman discovers that the pesticide being sprayed on vineyards is turning people into murderous lunatics.

recommendations.title: Lifechanger
recommendations.overview: A murderous shapeshifter sets out on a blood-soaked mission to make things right with the woman he loves.

recommendations.title: Drive Thru
recommendations.overview: A high-school student must save townspeople from a murderous clown who works at a fast-food place.
